name: Mendo
why: Mendo is focused on scaling enterprise AI adoption in Europe, positioning them as an AI-native transformation boutique.
evidence: Secures €12M to scale enterprise AI adoption.

name: Prometheus AI
why: Prometheus AI offers AI automation services and deploys AI agents for business functions like sales, reception, and workflow automation, acting as an embedded AI team for mid-size firms.
evidence: Provides AI agents for business that scale operations 24/7.

name: Infinity Constellation
why: Infinity Constellation is an AI-native holding company that builds and operates full-stack AI service businesses to automate and replace traditional professional services.

name: Happiest Minds
why: Happiest Minds, a digital engineering and IT company, launched Rel(AI)Build, an agentic AI platform to transform enterprise software delivery, making them a significant player in AI transformation.
evidence: Launches Rel(AI)Build, an Agentic AI Platform.

name: Poetic
why: Poetic is focused on automating complex enterprise processes with reliable AI, aiming to fix issues where AI agents currently fail, indicating a platform for robust agentic deployment.

name: Jedify
why: Jedify is building a 'context layer' to provide enterprise AI agents with the necessary information to function effectively, addressing a foundational need for agent deployment.
evidence: Raises $24M funding to build the context layer for enterprise AI agents.

name: ChatSee.ai
why: ChatSee.ai is tackling the problem of AI agent failures, suggesting a platform for monitoring, debugging, or optimizing AI agents for reliable operation.
evidence: Raises $6.5M funding to tackle AI agent failures.

name: Recursive
why: Recursive is focused on self-improving AI where models build models, representing a foundational advancement that could significantly impact future agentic systems and AI transformation.
